Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There you are. Finally found you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You hardly ever miss student council meetings. I've been looking all over for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Did someone ask you to come find me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Well, yeah. I'm not a member or anything, but still.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}They've been pretty busy, huh? What with the class trip and all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's for both second- and third-years, so I imagine you have your hands full, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Even if I did go, I'd only spoil the fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Wait, you're not thinking of skipping the trip, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You can't do that! That's not an option![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You know, I've been meaning to talk to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Well, honestly, you're not the easiest person to relate to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But I lost my dad, too. And I know what that's like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So I've decided I don't want our friendship to be over. I'm going to be more upfront with you from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I've been looking everywhere for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Huh? Weren't you looking for Miss President, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I was doing the same thing. Some guy asked me to find her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}He said if I didn't, the class trip might get canceled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Odagiri-kun... He'll hit up anyone in arm's reach for a favor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}In any case, looks like I found you, Mitsuru Kirijo-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And I have to say, you're quite stunning. Maybe we could go out sometime?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I know this place on the top floor of a five-star hotel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}The restaurant up there has a view of the city nightscape that's almost as breathtaking as you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Senpai! You better head back to the meeting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Takeba... Thank you for coming to find me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}For now, I'd better see to my duties.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Hey, she left without giving me an answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}"For now," huh. I don't like the sound of that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Well, how 'bout you, Yukari-san? Care to join me for dinner?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I know this place on Shirakawa Boulevard—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
